summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-20 through REQ-23) with good coverage. The backend adds Order types, placeOrder, and getOrders with stable storage via migration.mo. The frontend adds useOrders and usePlaceOrder hooks, a multi-step CheckoutPage with validation, and an Orders tab in AdminPage. A few minor gaps exist around order IDs not being embedded in the BackendOrder type returned by getOrders.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each order record includes an order ID so it can be identified and returned.
missing_requirements.reason: The BackendOrder type in main.mo does not include an id field. The placeOrder function returns the assigned Nat id, but getOrders returns [BackendOrder] without embedding the id inside each record, so callers cannot associate an order with its id.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each order card/row shows an order ID/number.
missing_requirements.reason: Because BackendOrder does not carry an id field, the Orders tab in AdminPage cannot display a meaningful order ID or number for each order card.

hallucinated_features.description: BackendOrder includes legacy fields quantity (aggregate item count) and paymentMethod (hardcoded to euro) that were not requested.
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirements specify the order should contain customer details, items, total, and timestamp only. The additional quantity aggregate and paymentMethod fields were not part of the spec.
